intro: Oreogrammitis abebaion is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ethiopian medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its purported health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Oreogrammitis abebaion include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Oreogrammitis abebaion is used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into herbal remedies and supplements in various forms.
